string.text: {=etxAXwEV}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=4yViiSAn}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, a noble clan of the Mamluk Sultanate.

{=iN8ABbte}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the Imperial Court and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Mamluk Sultanate.

{=U6ht3pNn}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Mamluk Sultanate.
{=cWZTP9jz}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, the most ancient and noble of the Turkic tribes.

{=PCmZ3zfz}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of the Mamluk Sultanate. The Christians we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
